_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of Pathogenic Missense Mutations of NF1 Using Computational Approaches.

_contextSnippet: The findings from the SNPeffect database indicated that the R1000C mutation increases the aggregation tendency of the protein. In contrast, the other two mutations, C379R and C1016Y, do not influence the protein's tendency to aggregate
details: Found R1000C mutation increases aggregation tendency, while C379R and C1016Y do not affect aggregation, amyloid formation, or chaperone binding
